name: African Tomato-Avocado-Buttermilk Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree tomatoes in a food processor or food mill, then press through a sieve to remove seeds.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat the pureed tomatoes, tomato paste, buttermilk, and olive oil together.
3. Toss mashed avocado with 1 tablespoon lemon juice to hold the color.
4. Add the avocado mixture, remaining lemon juice, and parsley to the tomato mixture; stir to mix well.
5. Season to taste with salt, pepper, and hot pepper sauce.
6. Refrigerate several hours before serving.
7. At serving time, taste soup for seasonings.
8. Ladle into individual bowls and have guests garnish their portions with cucumber and sour cream (or plain yogurt or crème fraîche).
9. Pass hot pepper sauce around to add more piquancy.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
